label: Clinical Pak
blurb: MedTech, Pharmacy & Specialized Healthcare. Extreme regulatory compliance and medical billing defense.

skills.label: Veterinary Vaccine Reminder
skills.method: Reads the clinic management system, texting pet owners 30 days before a Rabies/Bordetella shot expires with a one-click booking link.
trigger_examples: drives recurring revenue for vet clinics

skills.label: Lab Specimen Chain Of Custody
skills.method: Generates barcode labels and digital manifests tracking a blood vial from the phlebotomist's chair to the Quest Diagnostics centrifuge.

skills.label: Dental Xray Claim Attachment
skills.method: Automatically pulls the specific bitewing X-ray from the imaging software and attaches it to the exact tooth code on the NEA FastAttach insurance claim.

skills.label: Optical Rx To Lens Spec
skills.method: Translates an optometrist's raw prescription (Sphere, Cylinder, Axis) into the exact manufacturing specs required for the lens-grinding lab.

skills.label: Controlled Substance Log Auditor
skills.method: Cross-references the digital safe logs (Pyxis/Omnicell) with patient administration records to flag missing Oxycodone/Fentanyl.
trigger_examples: prevents dea raids and hospital drug diversion

skills.label: Home Health Mileage Router
skills.method: Calculates the optimal driving route for visiting nurses, separating billable clinical time from reimbursable driving mileage for payroll.

skills.label: Medicare Hcc Coder
skills.method: Scans a geriatric patient's history to suggest Hierarchical Condition Category (HCC) codes, ensuring the clinic gets paid for treating high-risk patients.

skills.label: Pbm Rebate Reconciler
skills.method: Audits Pharmacy Benefit Manager (PBM) contracts against dispensed prescriptions to ensure the pharmacy actually received their promised drug rebates.
trigger_examples: closes million-dollar pharmacy accounting black holes

skills.label: Medical Device Udi Tracker
skills.method: Scans the Unique Device Identifier (UDI) barcode on a pacemaker before surgery, auto-logging it into the FDA database and the patient EHR.
trigger_examples: ensures traceability for medical device recalls
